title: The Delhi Development Act, 1957
full_text: The Delhi Development Act, 1957 दिल्ली विकास अधिनियम, 1957 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195761 Act Number: 61 Enactment Date: 1957-12-27 Act Year: 1957 Short Title: The Delhi Development Act, 1957 Hindi Title: दिल्ली विकास अधिनियम, 1957 Long Title: An Act to provide for the development of Delhi according to plan and for matters ancillary thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs Enforcement Date: 30-12-1957 Notification: 30th December, 1957, vide notification No. S. R. O. 120, dated 30th December, 1957, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part. II, sec. 3. TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Delhi Development Act, 1957 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE DELHI DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY AND ITS OBJECTS CHAPTER III MASTER PLAN AND ZONAL DEVELOPMENT PLANS CHAPTER IIIA MODIFICATIONS TO THE MASTER PLAN AND THE ZONAL DEVELOPMENT PLAN CHAPTER IV DEVELOPMENT OF LANDS CHAPTER V ACQUISITION AND DISPOSAL OF LAND CHAPTER VI FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VII SUPPLEMENTAL AND MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. The Delhi Development Authority. Section 4. Staff of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Advisory Council. Section 5A. Constitution of committees. Section 6. Objects of the Authority. Section 7. Civic survey of, and master plan for, Delhi. Section 8. Zonal development plans. Section 9. Submission of plans to the Central Government for approval. Section 10. Procedure to be followed in the preparation and approval of plans. Section 11. Date of operation of plan. Section 11A. Modifications to plan. Section 12. Declaration of development areas and development of land in those and other areas. Section 13. Application for permission. Section 14. User of land and buildings in contravention of plans. Section 15. Compulsory acquisition of land. Section 16. [Omitted.]. Section 17. [Omitted.]. Section 18. [Omitted.]. Section 19. [Omitted.]. Section 20. [Omitted.]. Section 21. Disposal of land by the Authority or the local authority concerned. Section 22. Nazul lands. Section 22A. Power of Authority to develop land in non-development area. Section 23. Fund of the Authority. Section 24. Budget of the Authority. Section 25. Accounts and audit. Section 26. Annual report. Section 27. Pension and provident funds. Section 28. Powers of entry. Section 29. Penalties. Section 30. Order of demolition of building. Section 31. Power to stop development. Section 31A. Power to seal unauthorised development. Section 31B. Appellate Tribunal. Section 31C. Appeals. Section 31D. Appeals against orders of Appellate Tribunal. Section 31E. Bar of jurisdiction of courts. Section 32. Offences by companies. Section 33. Fines when realised to be paid to Authority or local authority concerned. Section 34. Composition of offences. Section 34A. Certain offences to be cognizable. Section 35. Default powers of the Authority. Section 36. Power of Authority to require local authority to assume responsibility for amenities in certain cases. Section 37. Power of Authority to levy betterment charges. Section 38. Assessment of betterment charge by Authority. Section 39. Settlement of betterment charge by arbitrators. Section 40. Payment of betterment charge. Section 40A. Mode of recovery of moneys due to Authority. Section 41. Control by Central Government. Section 42. Returns and inspection. Section 43. Service of notices, etc. Section 44. Public notice how to be made known. Section 45. Notices, etc., to fix reasonable time. Section 46. Authentication of orders and documents of the Authority. Section 47. Members and officers to be public servants. Section 48. Jurisdiction of courts. Section 49. Sanction of prosecution. Section 50. Magistrate’s power to impose enhanced penalties. Section 51. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 52. Power to delegate. Section 53. Effect of other laws. Section 53A. Restriction on power of a local authority to make rules, regulations or bye-laws in respect of certain matters. Section 53B. Notice to be given of suits. Section 54. Savings. Section 55. Plans to stand modified in certain cases. Section 56. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 57. Power to make regulations. Section 58. Laying of rules and regulations before Parliament. Section 59. Dissolution of the Authority. Section 60. Repeal, etc., and savings.
